[http://code.google.com/p/google-breakpad/ Google Breakpad] is a library which automatically gets human readable information out of a crash. This is used in [[OpenLieroX]] in case of a crash to get all important information and to prepare it all together for an automatic crash report.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20101228181048/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Breakpad -->
